name: reform-harness
description: Reform's personal harness source contract. This describes portable harness resources and capabilities; it is not a runtime configuration.

manifest_scope.describes: Reform's source harness resources and portable capabilities.
manifest_scope.does_not_describe: Runtime-local paths, install state, enable state, authorization grants, approval grants, or runtime-specific plugin manifests.

items.description: Current index for reusable workflow skills.
Explicit durable decisions Reform has made or approved.
Codex plugin package exposing the minimal harness skill index.

state_types.install: Makes a resource discoverable to a target runtime.
state_types.enable: Allows an installed resource to load or run in that runtime.
state_types.authorize: Connects external accounts, apps, or services.
state_types.approve: Grants trust-sensitive runtime actions such as shell access, file access, secrets, MCP servers, or hooks.

plugin_capability_model.adapter_rule: Resources declare portable capabilities here; adapters translate them into runtime-specific plugin or configuration formats.
